items.title_zh: 无论如何，当我非常确定……时，我只会邀请双倍长度的主题演讲。
items.description: for what it's worth, i only invite double-length track keynotes when I'm very sure that both speaker and content deserve it. Today, @chrmanning and @abshkbh did double duty at AIE and by all accounts* people loved the opportunity to go dee…
items.description_zh: 就其价值而言，只有当我非常确定演讲者和内容都值得时，我才会邀请双倍长度的主题演讲。今天，@chrmanning 和 @abshkbh 在 AIE 履行双重职责，从各方面来看*，人们很高兴有机会去深度学习……

items.title: Agents love to check their work before they push.

items.description: Agents love to check their work before they push. You probably see it in the form of 𝚗𝚘𝚍𝚎 --𝚌𝚑𝚎𝚌𝚔, 𝚝𝚜𝚌 --𝚗𝚘𝙴𝚖𝚒𝚝, 𝚗𝚎𝚡𝚝 𝚋𝚞𝚒𝚕𝚍, etc all over your agent sessions. We’re now shipping the dry-run step for agentic deplo…
items.description_zh: 代理商喜欢在推动之前检查他们的工作。您可能会以𝚗𝚘𝚍𝚎 --𝚌𝚑𝚎𝚌𝚔、𝚝𝚜𝚌 --𝚗𝚘𝙴𝚖𝚒𝚝、𝚗𝚎𝚡𝚝的形式看到它𝚋𝚞𝚒𝚕𝚍等遍布您的代理会话。我们现在正在交付代理部署的试运行步骤......
